name: Canonical Agents
description: Watches canonical agent files (.agent.md / AGENTS.md) and provisions them as OpenClaw agents via config reconciliation.

watchDirs.description: Directories to watch for agent files.

filePattern.description: Glob patterns used to discover agent files inside watchDirs.

defaultWorkspaceBase.description: Base path for auto-generated workspaces when workspace is not specified in the agent file.
